prompt: What are the architecture document naming conventions defined by arch-common? How should I name a project-level doc vs a module-level doc vs a component-level doc?

setup.context: user wants to create new architecture docs

assertions.name: specifies_architecture_md_for_l0
assertions.description: L0 project-level doc should be named ARCHITECTURE.md

assertions.name: specifies_arch_md_extension_for_l1_l2
assertions.description: L1/L2 docs should use *.arch.md naming pattern

assertions.name: gives_naming_examples
assertions.description: Should give concrete naming examples (e.g. auth.arch.md, payment.arch.md)

assertions.name: explains_case_convention
assertions.description: Should clarify case convention (uppercase ARCHITECTURE.md vs lowercase *.arch.md)
